question: [File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/service/NetworkServiceImpl.java -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: getNetworkNodes(NetworkNodeRequest)] Can an unprivileged external user call GET /api/v1/network/nodes with no parameters to enumerate all consensus node service endpoints (ip_address_v4, port, domain_name) from serviceEndpointsJson, enabling targeted DDoS against every gossip endpoint to prevent transaction propagation across the entire network?

[File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/service/NetworkServiceImpl.java -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: getNetworkNodes(NetworkNodeRequest)] Can an unprivileged external user paginate through all 25-node pages via the 'next' link returned in NetworkNodesResponse to reconstruct the complete gossip network topology, then selectively DDoS the minimum set of high-stake nodes required to halt consensus gossip?

[File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/service/NetworkServiceImpl.java -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: getNetworkNodes(NetworkNodeRequest)] Can an unprivileged external user supply an arbitrary file.id (e.g., 0.0.101 startup address book) via getAddressBookFileId() to retrieve an alternative address book containing gossip endpoints not exposed in the default file 102 address book, revealing additional attack targets to suppress transaction gossip?

[File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/service/NetworkServiceImpl.java -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: getNetworkNodes(NetworkNodeRequest)] Can an unprivileged external user retrieve the publicKey field for every consensus node via findNetworkNodes() and use those public keys to fingerprint and track individual nodes across IP changes, maintaining a persistent target list to continuously disrupt gossip propagation?

[File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/service/NetworkServiceImpl.java -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: getNetworkNodes(NetworkNodeRequest)] Can an unprivileged external user use the nodeAccountId field returned by findNetworkNodes() to correlate each consensus node with its account, then submit transactions that drain node accounts to zero, causing nodes to be unable to pay gossip-related fees and halting transaction propagation?

[File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/service/NetworkServiceImpl.java -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: getNetworkNodes(NetworkNodeRequest)] Can an unprivileged external user pass orderDirection='DESC' to findNetworkNodes() to retrieve the highest node IDs first, identifying recently added nodes that may have weaker gossip connections, and target those nodes to fragment the gossip graph?

[File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/service/NetworkServiceImpl.java -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: getNetworkNodes(NetworkNodeRequest)] Can an unprivileged external user submit multiple concurrent requests to GET /api/v1/network/nodes with varying node.id ranges to exhaust database connection pool resources via the expensive native SQL CTE query in findNetworkNodes(), causing a denial-of-service that prevents legitimate clients from discovering gossip nodes?

[File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/service/NetworkServiceImpl.java -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: getNetworkNodes(NetworkNodeRequest)] Can an unprivileged external user supply multiple EQ node.id parameters (e.g., node.id=0&node.id=1&node.id=2) to populate the nodeIds HashSet and trigger the Range.closed(lowerBound, upperBound).contains() filter, enumerating specific high-value gossip nodes by ID to build a targeted attack list?
